ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality (e.g., Argentina, Portugal) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the nationality (e.g., South America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., RF, ST, LW, GK) */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., Attacking, Midfield, Defending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  "position_preferred" INTEGER /* Is the position preferred by the player? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-stat combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Goals, Assists, Saves) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Transfer fee of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team FOREIGN KEY ("to_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team FOREIGN KEY ("from_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., Club, National) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., Domestic, International) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, scout) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Club, Agent, Media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" INTEGER /* Predicted value of the statistic */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommender_system" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being recommended */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., transfer, signing) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommender_system_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., height, weight) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (e.g., physical, technical, mental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "history_event" TEXT /* Description of the event (e.g., transfer, injury, award) */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., transfer, loan, release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date the formation was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
